choice: Snapshots = one append-only row per (asset, as_of), grouped by a shared batch_id per sync/import/entry event. Asset ownership via an asset_owners join table (asset+person composite PK). Year-level availability for income_streams and contributions stored as jsonb {ranges:[{startYear,endYear}], excludeYears:[]}. Scenario.assumptions and Forecast.bands/successCurve/startingInputs stored as typed jsonb blobs (typed via Drizzle .<>()), not normalized columns. Exactly-one-active-Plan enforced by a partial unique index on scenarios(household_id) WHERE is_plan=true. Money as numeric(14,2), growth/rates as numeric(6,4).
rationale: [build-originated] Grooming defined the domain concepts (2949f831, a5edec0f, b6012bc6, b1ee4eca, c9da4675) but not the table shapes. jsonb blobs keep the evolving engine input/output flexible without a migration per knob; batch_id makes a 'dated set of balances' queryable while staying append-only; partial unique index makes the single-Plan invariant a DB constraint rather than app logic.
